entities.name: Resume
entities.context: Characterized as marketing material and self-narrative rather than factual record of work

entities.name: Brand name
entities.context: Identified as a meaningless hiring signal that doesn't reveal truth about candidates

entities.name: Tenure
entities.context: Identified as a meaningless hiring signal alongside brand name

entities.name: Self-presentation
entities.context: Skill at framing experience using keywords and positive language; some excel at it, builders often don't

entities.name: Builders
entities.context: People who are heads-down creating things but don't optimize for legibility or self-promotion

entities.name: Appearance-based hiring
entities.context: System designed to process appearance rather than substance; rewards storytelling over actual work

relationships.context: Resumes reward those skilled at self-presentation and storytelling
Brand names are surface signals processed by appearance-based systems
Tenure is a surface signal that doesn't reveal actual capability
Builders are often poor at self-presentation, assuming work speaks for itself
Appearance-based systems reward self-presentation skill over actual building
